parameters.query: SELECT id, name, max_guests, rooms, base_price, COALESCE(description,'') AS description FROM apartments WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY id;

SELECT apartment_id,   to_char(checkin_at,'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS checkin_at,   to_char(checkout_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkout_at,   status, source, COALESCE(notes,'') AS notes FROM bookings WHERE checkout_at >= CURRENT_DATE   AND checkin_at  <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days'   AND status IN ('confirmed','booking') ORDER BY apartment_id, checkin_at;

SELECT gw.apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       to_char(gw.gap_start,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS gap_start,
       to_char(gw.gap_end,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS gap_end,
       gw.nights, gw.estimated_loss, gw.recommendation
FROM gap_windows gw
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = gw.apartment_id
WHERE gw.status = 'open'
  AND gw.gap_start >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY gw.estimated_loss DESC NULLS LAST, gw.gap_start

SELECT pr.apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       to_char(pr.date_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date_from,
       to_char(pr.date_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')   AS date_to,
       pr.nights, pr.current_price, pr.recommended_price,
       pr.recommendation_type, pr.reason, pr.confidence
FROM pricing_recommendations pr
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = pr.apartment_id
WHERE pr.status IN ('draft','approved') AND pr.date_from >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY pr.confidence DESC NULLS LAST, pr.date_from

SELECT
  cs.name, cs.source_platform, cs.url, cs.district,
  cs.similarity_score, cs.status,
  cs.price_low, cs.price_high,
  cs.selection_reason, cs.exclusion_reason,
  cs.last_checked_at,
  (SELECT cpo.price_per_night
   FROM competitor_price_observations cpo
   WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
   ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_price,
  (SELECT cpo.observed_at
   FROM competitor_price_observations cpo
   WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
   ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_observed_at,
  (SELECT (NOW() - cpo.observed_at) > INTERVAL '14 days'
   FROM competitor_price_observations cpo
   WHERE cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
   ORDER BY cpo.observed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS is_stale
FROM competitor_sources cs
ORDER BY cs.status, cs.priority
